title: BBDriverPhysics
description: Feel immersed when driving fast in boats
body:
When you are going really fast ice boat racing and you are sitting bolt upright, don't you think golly I wish this was more immersive?

Well if yes this is the mod for you!!

Finally now your ingame self is fully experiencing every turn and crash with my *"very accurate"* physics simulation.<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/O9X4NsSROGI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
